name: templates/title-hero
description: Opening slide template with a clear title, subtitle, and badges.

usage: Paste snippet HTML inside .ls-deck and copy its registryDependencies before use.
Use .ls-slide-fill for full-slide centering; keep title copy concise enough for one or two lines.
Use .ls-panel--fit for short text-only right panels; use .ls-panel--frame for screenshots, diagrams, or media anchors.

composition.copyGuidance: One concise title, one subtitle, and a visual anchor; hero slides intentionally span the full slide.
avoidWhen: the slide is an ordinary content slide with a header/body shell

alternatives.when: presenting regular content under a header

useCases: Open a deck or major section with a centered title statement.
